title: phyllactis rigida
intro: Phyllactis rigida is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the "prickly lettuce" or "hairy lettuce". The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllactis rigida include reducing inflammation and improving digestive health, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as arthritis and digestive disorders. Phyllactis rigida can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
